content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the car positioned near the right edge of the track, following the curve correctly.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 85, target = (85 + 5) % 121 = 90
- Target WP90: x=6.6672, y=2.6776
- Car: x=0.8035, y=4.0582, heading=-153.65°
- dy = 2.6776 - 4.0582 = -1.3806
- dx = 6.6672 - 0.8035 = 5.8637
- bearing = atan2(-1.3806, 5.8637) = atan2(-1.3806, 5.8637) = -13.25°
- delta = -13.25° - (-153.65°) = +140.40°
- Normalize: 140.40° (no adjustment needed)

This large positive delta is because WP90 is far across the track on the other side of the curve. The car is heading southwest (-153°) and WP90 is to the east-southeast. The track is curving right (south then east), so continuing right steering is correct. The car is on track and following the curve well.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply right ahead; car is on course near WP84-85 heading southwest at -153.6°, continuing the right-hand bend toward WP90 which requires sustained right steering.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Near WP84-90, track curves sharply right — heading transitions from ~-149° toward ~-176°",
    "Speed 0.75 for |delta|>50°; 1.0 for 30-50°; 1.5 for <30°",
    "WP+5 target gives large delta on tight curves — use visual cues to confirm steering direction",
    "Track curves sharply right after WP84 toward WP89-90 — maintain negative steering",
    "Track width ~0.76m — small corrections sufficient, avoid overcorrecting",
    "Car is slightly right of center (0.030m) — consistent with right curve approach",
    "Heading near -153° corresponds to southwest travel on this section of track",
    "Sustained -20° steering at 1.0 speed is working well through this right-hand curve"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.086, 0.993, 0.896, 0.803],
    "y": [4.184, 4.142, 4.099, 4.058],
    "yaw": [-149.49, -151.36, -152.64, -153.65]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP90 at (6.667, 2.678): dy=-1.381, dx=5.864, bearing=-13.25°, delta=+140.40° (large due to far waypoint across track curve) → continue right turn",
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
